mapper.select: SELECT ST_AsMVT(tile, 'stations', 4096, 'geom') AS mvt FROM ( SELECT id, name, city, category, passenger, ST_AsMVTGeom(geom, ${envelope}, 4096, 256, true) AS geom FROM stations WHERE geom && ${envelope} AND ST_Intersects(geom, ${envelope}) ) AS tile WHERE geom IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, osm_id, name, name_pinyin, city, province, railway, category, passenger, freight, is_hub, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom_wkt, source_grid, data_quality FROM stations WHERE geom && ${envelope} AND ST_Intersects(geom, ${envelope}) LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, name, city, province, category, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat FROM stations WHERE name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR name_pinyin ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR city = #{keyword} ORDER BY CASE WHEN name = #{keyword} THEN 0 WHEN name ILIKE #{keyword} || '%' THEN 1 WHEN city = #{keyword} THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, CASE category WHEN 'major_hub' THEN 0 WHEN 'major_passenger' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium_passenger' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, name, city, province, category, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat FROM stations WHERE name_pinyin ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR REPLACE(name_pinyin, ' ', '') LIKE #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY CASE WHEN REPLACE(name_pinyin, ' ', '') LIKE #{keyword} || '%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE category WHEN 'major_hub' THEN 0 WHEN 'major_passenger' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium_passenger' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, name, city, province, category, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat FROM stations WHERE city = #{city} ORDER BY CASE category WHEN 'major_hub' THEN 0 WHEN 'major_passenger' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium_passenger' THEN 2 WHEN 'small_passenger' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END LIMIT #{limit}
